conversation.content:

Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="79 (not reached)" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states: 'Median survival was 46 months (IQR 25, 92) in the SOC-alone group and 79 months (IQR 33, not reached) in the SOC + AAP group'. SOC + AAP is the experimental arm."
